name: Novi Blaster
short_description: Bullet Hell or Heaven? A rogue-like where you upgrade yourself and your enemies. Strategize around your build choices and dominate the battlefields of Novi Blaster.
detailed_description:
The Enemy is growing with you

Every time you pick an upgrade, you also pick an upgrade for your enemies, adding an extra layer of strategy around your builds.

Do you really want to give an enemy more attack speed or is it better to make them more tanky? Your choice.

Hell or Heaven? Both?

Depending on your choices you can easily turn this game into a bullet heaven, but make some risky decisions and you will quickly find yourself in a bullet hell.

Unlockables and Difficulties

A quest system to give you more choices for your builds.

Collect Prestige with each run to make your ship stronger.

5 main difficulties to beat. The Royal Difficulty will infinitely scale up, so you never run out of a challenge.

Not sold yet? Try the demo!

Play the demo version to get a taste of Novi Blaster. Get the full game to access the progression system and harder difficulties.

[The Demo will be available soon!]
